_comment: LISTENING RENDER for the record-feedback bloom (spec 2026-07-21 section 1). Records 8 s of the storm, then walks the feedback knob across the knee: 0.9 (-6 dB, the old top of travel), 0.95 (the boot default, now ~-1.8 dB), 0.971 (unity -- the loop should sustain forever without growing), and 1.0 (the bloom, where the buffer saturates into itself and stops being a recording). Synth silenced throughout so the deck is the only thing sounding.

init._comment: part A silenced: zero base AND LEVEL modulation off

slot 3 (MOTION) parked inactive: this render is about the feedback knee, not scatter. Its old 'set_target_base slot 3 = 0.3' line is dropped here (review 2026-07-22, F-04 follow-up) -- post F-04, set_target_base(..., LANE_MOTION, ...) is deliberately inert on a sampler deck while the lane is inactive (part.cpp), so that line stopped doing anything the moment the fix landed. MOD (set_depth) is the control that would reach MOTION now, and this scenario deliberately leaves it untouched (default depth 1.0, but MOTION inactive means it never applies) so the bloom is the only thing moving.

events._comment: 10-22s: -6 dB, the old top of travel. Decays.
22-34s: the boot default, now ~-1.8 dB. Decays slowly.
34-46s: unity. Should hold without growing or fading.
46-60s: the bloom. Should saturate and stay bounded.
